TRACLUS 1.0.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Package index

Workflow

Core TRACLUS pipeline functions

tc_trajectories() stable
Validate and prepare trajectory data
tc_partition() stable
Partition trajectories using MDL-based approximation
tc_cluster() stable
Cluster line segments using density-based clustering
tc_represent() stable
Generate representative trajectories for clusters
tc_traclus() stable
Run the complete TRACLUS algorithm

Helpers

Parameter estimation and data import

tc_estimate_params() stable
Estimate clustering parameters from data
tc_read_hurdat2() stable
Read HURDAT2 Best-Track data

Distance Functions

Exported distance components

tc_dist_perpendicular() stable
Perpendicular distance between two line segments
tc_dist_parallel()
Parallel distance between two line segments
tc_dist_angle()
Angle distance between two line segments
tc_dist_segments()
Weighted total distance between two line segments

Visualisation

Plot methods and interactive maps

plot(<tc_trajectories>) plot(<tc_partitions>) plot(<tc_clusters>) plot(<tc_representatives>) plot(<tc_traclus>)
Plot methods for TRACLUS objects
plot(<tc_estimate>)
Plot method for tc_estimate objects
tc_leaflet() stable
Leaflet map for TRACLUS objects
tc_plot()
Plot TRACLUS objects

Print and Summary

S3 print and summary methods

print(<tc_trajectories>) print(<tc_partitions>) print(<tc_clusters>) print(<tc_representatives>) print(<tc_traclus>)
Print methods for TRACLUS objects
print(<tc_estimate>)
Print method for tc_estimate objects
summary(<tc_trajectories>) summary(<tc_partitions>) summary(<tc_clusters>) summary(<tc_representatives>) summary(<tc_traclus>) summary(<tc_estimate>)
Summary methods for TRACLUS objects

Data

Included datasets

traclus_toy
Toy trajectory dataset

Package

TRACLUS TRACLUS-package
TRACLUS: Trajectory Clustering Using Line Segments

On this page
